nodes.label: AI as skill gap filler and learning accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that bypasses skill development
nodes.grounding_span: AI can help filling in gaps or weaknesses in a skill-set

nodes.label: AI as creative companion (R2D2)
nodes.grounding_span: AI is like the buddy on my shoulder, my R2D2

nodes.label: AI for administrative and logistical efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I can focus on the creative work and leave all that boring stuff to AI

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic craft and human journey
nodes.label_negative: AI as enabler of artistic growth
nodes.grounding_span: concern with it completely taking over

nodes.label: AI as tool for creative challenges and self-motivation
nodes.label_negative: AI as passive assistant without challenge
nodes.grounding_span: leverage AI to establish a challenge routine where it presents a task to make something

nodes.label: Artistic growth and craft development
nodes.grounding_span: it's about growing through my craft and seeking enjoyment and fulfillment

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and human agency
nodes.grounding_span: It is always me who is driving the creative process

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This has saved me so much time

nodes.label: Harmonious human-AI symbiosis
nodes.grounding_span: AI should be developed in harmony with human creativity

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI as learning and efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself constantly using AI

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human creativity and devaluing craft
nodes.grounding_span: concern with it completely taking over

nodes.label: Optimism about AI enabling more creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I can essentially do even more creative work now

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: there is deliberation and re-iteration through the process

nodes.label: Strategic delegation of weaknesses to focus on strengths
nodes.grounding_span: fill in for my weaknesses and then focus on what I'm good at
